name: Weiss, Doug
resolved_employer: City of Pflugerville (Mayor, sworn in Dec. 2025; Pflugerville City Council member at the time of the donation); day job in technology management at Shutterfly
evidence: Confirmed by exact address match: the donor address "Pflugerville, TX 78691-0708" matches the PO BOX 708, Pflugerville, TX 78691 published on Doug Weiss's official campaign site. He was a nine-year Pflugerville City Council member when he gave $50 to Travis County Commissioner Brigid Shea on 2025-06-21, and won the December 2025 mayoral runoff with 56% of the vote. Career: 17 years at Group 1 Software, then Shutterfly as solutions architect and later manager over three automation/enablement teams. Not a registered Texas lobbyist, and no ideological-PAC (pro-Israel, pro-Palestine, oil & gas, gun-rights, gun-control, or defense) ties surfaced in FEC or other public records. Note: the pipeline's fec_partisan_lean of 0 for this donor conflicts with the public record (TCDP-endorsed, ActBlue fundraising) and is likely an FEC name-collision artifact.
